en: How do you go to the block-house?
I drive to the block-house.
How does he go to the hospital?
He walks to the hospital.
How do you go to Taitung?
I go to Penghu by plane.
I go to Penghu by Lanyu.
I go to Penghu by Lanyu.
How do you go home?
I go home by train.

ab: Ma’aq ca Danivu’un na dazan munha’an pasnanavan ta?
en: How does Danivu go to school?
Danivu goes to school by train.
How does Usung go to church?
Usung goes to church by bicycle.
Do you go to school by MRT?
No, I go to school by bus.
Do you go to school by bicycle?
Yes, I go to school by bicycle.
Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?
Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Tunlehlehkisia casu munha’an taitu doqe tunhekuki?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Tunhikuki cak, mopa i tan na hikuki i lehlehkisia mahiav.
ch: B:我搭飛機，因為搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Tunlehlehqatumu casu munha’an kukai doqe anak untin lehleh?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是自己開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Na untin cak lehleh mukukai, mopa i maca anak manutinlehleh ka tani dazalehlehqatumu mastan kandang.
ch: B:我開車去教會，因為開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Michuan na babalivan ni lumaq mu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Ni’i, Amin cak tunutuvia muha’an babalivanta.
ch: B:並沒有，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.
Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Michuan sala, muaz tunpantac sa na kadipin.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Michuan na Kakounan ngi panduanlehleh ta?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Mintasal li panduanlehleh moqnan munmai mudan hima zikang nga na.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
